name: code-analyzer
description: AI-powered code review: explain, find bugs, suggest refactoring, and generate tests and documentation

tools.title: Read Code File
tools.description: Read the content of a source code file. Returns the full source code with detected programming language, line count, and file info. Supports 30+ languages (JS, TS, Python, C#, Java, Go, Rust, etc.).

tools.title: List Code Files
tools.description: List all code files in a folder. Returns file paths filtered by programming language extensions. Optionally specify extensions to filter (e.g. ['js', 'ts']). Does not recurse into subfolders.

actions.title: Explain Code
actions.description: Explain what the code does for the target audience

actions.title: Find Bugs
actions.description: Identify potential bugs, errors, and security vulnerabilities in the code

actions.title: Suggest Refactoring
actions.description: Suggest code improvements, refactoring opportunities, and best practices

actions.title: Generate Tests
actions.description: Generate unit tests for the code

actions.title: Generate Documentation
actions.description: Generate inline documentation and comments for the code

actions.title: Analyze Dependencies
actions.description: Analyze dependencies and relationships across the selected code files
